prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Pale dawn light spills through a rock-hewn opening onto folded linen while the tomb interior and the garden hold cool shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
An open rock-hewn tomb cut into a hillside, the great round stone rolled aside from the dark doorway, folded grave-linen left on the stone ledge within, pale dawn light spilling across the threshold, the garden in cool shadow beyond the opening. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the open tomb, the stone rolled aside, dawn light entering.

Cut to mid framing — the dark empty doorway of the tomb.

Cut to insert — the folded grave-linen on the stone ledge.

Cut to insert — the great round stone rolled aside.

Cut to macro detail — the dawn light on the stone threshold.

Cut to upper framing — the garden and pale dawn sky beyond the opening.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the empty tomb in the dawn light.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Dawning, quiet hope after grief.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — open tomb, stone rolled aside, dawn light entering
Cut to mid framing — the dark empty doorway of the tomb
Cut to insert — folded grave-linen on the stone ledge
Cut to insert — the great round stone rolled aside
Cut to macro detail — dawn light on the stone threshold
Cut to upper framing — the garden and pale dawn sky beyond the opening
Return to full composition, end hold on the empty tomb in the dawn light
